basic_details.short_information: Neyveli Lignite Corporation (NLC) has published the Consultant (Junior Level) Notification 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 3 Consultant (Junior Level) positions. Candidates with a maximum age limit of 64 years and holding qualifications such as H.S.C./Higher Education with PGDCA/DCA Certificate from a recognized institute are eligible to apply offline through the official NLC website. The application process will be active from the notification release date to 03-08-2026, and candidates can easily access the notification PDF and apply link below.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 64 years for all posts.

qualification.education_qualification: H.S.C. / Higher with PGDCA / DCA Certificate from a recognized Institute, H.S.C. / Higher Education

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for NLC Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.nlcindia.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for NLC Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.nlcindia.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 03-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the NLC Consultant (Junior Level) posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the NLC Consultant (Junior Level) posts is 03 August 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated address before this date.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the NLC Consultant (Junior Level) posts?
faq.answer: For the Data Entry Operator post, a H.S.C. / Higher with PGDCA / DCA Certificate is required. For the Field Assistant post, H.S.C. / Higher Education is the minimum qualification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the NLC Consultant (Junior Level) recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for all Consultant (Junior Level) posts is 64 years. There is no minimum age limit specified in the provided data.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Consultant (Junior Level) posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 3 vacancies for the Consultant (Junior Level) posts. Two vacancies are for Data Entry Operator and one is for Field Assistant.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the NLC Consultant (Junior Level) positions?
faq.answer: The salary for the Data Entry Operator post is Rs. 18,000/- per month, and for the Field Assistant post, it is Rs. 15,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the NLC Consultant (Junior Level) recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q7. What is the mode of application for the NLC Consultant (Junior Level) posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for these posts is Offline. Candidates need to send their application form to the official address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for the NLC Consultant (Junior Level) positions?
faq.answer: The job type for these positions is Contractual.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the NLC Consultant (Junior Level) recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting of candidates followed by a selection by a committee.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form for NLC Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of NLC India Limited, www.nlcindia.in. Direct links are also provided in the Important Links section of this article.
